parse_assembly_config.name: appsmith-v2 real config
parse_assembly_config.raw:
inject_when_referenced:
  - backend/docs/rules/agent-security.md
require_reference:
  - file: backend/docs/rules/agent-security.md
    for: "backend/app/llm/**/*prompt*.md"
    severity: critical

check_required_references.name: nested prompt missing ref → violation
check_required_references.config_raw:
inject_when_referenced:
  - backend/docs/rules/agent-security.md
require_reference:
  - file: backend/docs/rules/agent-security.md
    for: "backend/app/llm/**/*prompt*.md"
    severity: critical

check_required_references.name: top-level (zero dirs) missing ref → violation
check_required_references.config_raw:
inject_when_referenced:
  - backend/docs/rules/agent-security.md
require_reference:
  - file: backend/docs/rules/agent-security.md
    for: "backend/app/llm/**/*prompt*.md"
    severity: critical

check_required_references.name: single-* does NOT cross dir (minimatch) → no violation
check_required_references.config_raw:
require_reference:
  - file: backend/docs/rules/agent-security.md
    for: "backend/app/llm/*.md"
    severity: critical

check_required_references.name: references the doc → no violation
check_required_references.config_raw:
inject_when_referenced:
  - backend/docs/rules/agent-security.md
require_reference:
  - file: backend/docs/rules/agent-security.md
    for: "backend/app/llm/**/*prompt*.md"
    severity: critical
